phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica o caixa?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYE-shuh?

likely_response.local: O caixa fica no balcão onde se faz o pedido e o pagamento.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh NOO bahl-KOWN OHNG-dih SIH FAHSH AW peh-DEE-doo EH AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: The cashier is at the counter where orders and payments are made.

responses.english: The cashier is at the counter where orders and payments are made.
responses.phonetic: AW KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh NOO bahl-KOWN OHNG-dih SIH FAHSH AW peh-DEE-doo EH AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too.
responses.local: O caixa fica no balcão onde se faz o pedido e o pagamento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the J.K. Rowling corner table is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a mesa do canto da J.K. Rowling?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH MEH-zuh DOO KAHNNG-too DUH ZHAW-tuh.KAH-puh. ehn-ROW-leengptpt?
phrases.cultural_note: The table is a popular photo spot; staff direct guests efficiently to preserve seating flow.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pergunte ao garçom, por favor.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG, POOR fuh-VOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask the waiter, please.

responses.english: Good morning, ask the waiter, please.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG, POOR fuh-VOHR.
responses.local: Bom dia, pergunte ao garçom, por favor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Art Nouveau ceiling frescoes are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os frescos art nouveau do teto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH FREHSH-koosh AH-ruht noow-VEEOW DOO TEH-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The frescoes cover the entire main dining room; guests are advised to look up while seated.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, observe o teto central da sala.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, awb-SEH-ruh-vih AW TEH-too sayngt-RAHL DUH SAH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, look at the central hall ceiling.

responses.english: Good morning, look at the central hall ceiling.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, awb-SEH-ruh-vih AW TEH-too sayngt-RAHL DUH SAH-luh.
responses.local: Bom dia, observe o teto central da sala.

likely_response.local: Pode pedir no balcão ou a um garçom.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER NOO bahl-KOWN OHW AH OONNG guh-ruh-SOHNG.
likely_response.translation_en: You can order at the counter or from a waiter.

responses.english: You can order at the counter or from a waiter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER NOO bahl-KOWN OHW AH OONNG guh-ruh-SOHNG.
responses.local: Pode pedir no balcão ou a um garçom.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic black-and-white photos are
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde ficam as fotos históricas a preto e branco?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH FOH-toosh eesh-TAW-ree-kuhsh AH PREH-too EH BRAHNNG-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Vintage photographs line the side walls; they document the café’s early 20th-century clientele.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou ao maître, por favor.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW MUHEET-rih, POOR fuh-VOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Please, where are the historic black-and-white photos? Ask the waiter or the maître, please.

responses.english: Please, where are the historic black-and-white photos? Ask the waiter or the maître, please.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW MUHEET-rih, POOR fuh-VOHR.
responses.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou ao maître, por favor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the J.K. Rowling table is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde está a mesa da J.K. Rowling?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH MEH-zuh DUH ZHAW-tuh.KAH-puh. ehn-ROW-leengptpt?
phrases.cultural_note: J.K. Rowling wrote parts of Harry Potter at this iconic table in Café Majestic.

likely_response.translation_en: In the corner, near the window.

responses.english: In the corner, near the window.
